slide1_body: Kigali's first citizen-led plastic waste tracking platform. Together, we can make a real difference.
slide2_body: Report waste (+{{report}} pts), log recycling (+{{recycling}} pts), get verified (+{{bonus}} bonus). Points unlock rewards and badges.
slide3_body: Compete with neighbours in your sector. Top citizens unlock exclusive badges and community recognition.
slide4_body: Start your first report and earn {{report}} points right now. Kigali is counting on you!
